name: faq-grouped
title: FAQ Grouped
description: An FAQ split into titled, icon-tagged category groups of accordions, installed as a wired Payload block.

preview.summary: FAQ grouped into titled, icon-tagged categories of accordions.

sampleContent.title: How can we help?
sampleContent.description: Browse answers by topic, or reach out if you still need a hand.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Click Sign up, then connect your first data source — most teams ship in an afternoon.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial with full access to every feature and no credit card.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: All major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers for annual plans.

items.question: Can I get a refund?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee — contact support within 30 days.
